about.title: About Us
about.description: We are a veterinary clinic in Chilca focused on preventive medicine, timely diagnostics, and close support for every pet family.
about.storyText:
At Enro’s Vet, we believe that every pet is part of the family, and therefore deserves medical care based on trust, respect, and closeness. We were founded with the purpose of providing clear and compassionate veterinary care, where every owner can understand their pet’s health condition and feel supported in every decision.
Our team combines clinical experience with a preventive approach, prioritizing early detection of diseases and the overall well-being of each patient. We know that good communication is key, which is why we explain every diagnosis and treatment in a simple way, so you can always feel confident and informed.
Beyond each consultation, we aim to build long-term relationships with every family that trusts us. We focus on creating a safe and welcoming environment where both pets and their owners feel comfortable and well cared for.
At Enro’s Vet, we don’t just care for your pet’s health, we also care for the trust you place in us.
about.staffDescription: A multidisciplinary team for general consultations, clinical diagnostics, and ongoing follow-up care.
about.reviewsDescription: A few experiences shared by clients who trust us with their pets.

contact.title: Contact and Bookings
contact.description: You can message us on WhatsApp, call us, or leave your details to schedule an appointment.
contact.faqDescription: Quick answers so you can schedule with more clarity.
contact.referenceNote: Layout inspired by common contact patterns from veterinary websites in Peru: immediate WhatsApp CTA, visible schedule, and map-based location.

whatsapp.title: Immediate assistance
whatsapp.text: Priority channel for bookings and quick questions during business hours.

highlights.responsive: Support before and after every appointment

generalConsultation.title: General Consultation
generalConsultation.description: Clinical check-up to detect early risks and define a health plan for your pet.
generalConsultation.point1: Weight, body condition, and vital signs review
generalConsultation.point2: Skin, ears, eyes, and oral cavity assessment

cardiologyConsultation.title: Cardiology Consultation
cardiologyConsultation.description: Specialized assessment for pets with murmurs, fatigue, or suspected heart disease.
cardiologyConsultation.point2: Echocardiogram for structure and function analysis

traumatologyConsultation.title: Traumatology Consultation
traumatologyConsultation.description: Care for musculoskeletal injuries, lameness, fractures, and joint pain.
traumatologyConsultation.point2: Treatment plan based on the injury profile

dermatologyConsultation.title: Dermatology Consultation
dermatologyConsultation.description: Diagnosis and treatment of allergies, itching, hair loss, and skin infections.

ophthalmologyConsultation.title: Ophthalmology Consultation
ophthalmologyConsultation.description: Ocular evaluation to diagnose and treat visual and eye-related conditions.
ophthalmologyConsultation.point2: Early detection of ulcers and cataracts

abdominalUltrasound.title: Abdominal Ultrasound
abdominalUltrasound.description: Non-invasive diagnostic imaging to evaluate internal organs and support clinical decisions.
abdominalUltrasound.point2: Bladder, uterus, and lymph node review

preventiveConsultation.title: Preventive Consultation
preventiveConsultation.description: General check-up to identify early risks and keep your pet healthy.

vaccinationAndDeworming.title: Vaccination and Deworming
vaccinationAndDeworming.description: Age-based and lifestyle-based protocols for year-round protection.

clinicalLab.title: Clinical Laboratory
clinicalLab.description: Diagnostic support tests for faster and more accurate medical decisions.

surgeryAndHospitalization.title: Surgery and Hospitalization
surgeryAndHospitalization.description: Safe procedures with monitoring and guided recovery.

groomingAndPetshop.title: Grooming and Pet Shop
groomingAndPetshop.description: Hygiene, styling, and selected products for your pet's daily wellbeing.

humanCare.title: Compassionate Care
humanCare.description: We listen to each pet parent, explain diagnoses clearly, and build realistic care plans for each pet's wellbeing.

medicalCriteria.title: Clinical Standards
medicalCriteria.description: We apply evidence-based protocols to make timely decisions in prevention, diagnostics, and treatment.

continuousFollowup.title: Continuous Follow-up
continuousFollowup.description: Care does not end at the visit: we provide home guidance, scheduled checks, and evolution monitoring by case.

drEnrique.name: Dr. Carlos Enrique
drEnrique.bio: Leads comprehensive clinical evaluations and coordinates therapeutic plans for canine and feline patients.
drEnrique.imageAlt: Veterinarian examining a pet during consultation

draLucia.name: Dr. Lucia Mendoza
draLucia.bio: Focused on preventive medicine, vaccination schedules, and nutrition guidance for early and adult life stages.

drMarco.name: Dr. Marco Salazar
drMarco.role: Veterinary Doctor · Surgery and Urgent Care
drMarco.bio: Handles surgical procedures, first-response stabilization, and post-operative follow-up for safe recovery.

petParentAna.name: Ana M. · Luna's pet parent
petParentAna.text: They always explain treatment clearly and handle Luna with great patience.

petParentLuis.name: Luis R. · Toby's pet parent
petParentLuis.text: The care was fast and professional. They helped us solve an urgent case the same day.

petParentSofia.name: Sofia P. · Misha's pet parent
petParentSofia.text: I value their follow-up after each visit. You can see real commitment to every pet.

firstVisit.question: What should I bring to the first appointment?
firstVisit.answer: Bring your pet's vaccination card, medical records if available, and a brief summary of symptoms or behavior changes.

vaccines.question: How often should my pet get vaccinated?
vaccines.answer: It depends on age, species, and health status. We review each case and define a tailored schedule.

emergency.question: Do you provide emergency care?
emergency.answer: Yes. We provide first response and stabilization. Message us on WhatsApp for immediate guidance.

paymentMethods.question: What payment methods do you accept?
paymentMethods.answer: We accept cash, bank transfers, and common local digital payment methods.
